creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://www.matrix.org/> is generic. 

<https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse> refers to <https://matrix-org.github.io/synapse>, so I guess that the latter (not the page to which it currently redirects) should become the WWW.

Re: the description, 

> ⋯ ambitious new ⋯ 0.5 ⋯

Matrix was new a few years ago, and (bug 273563) we're way beyond 0.5, so a refresh of the entire description might be good. 

Sascha Biberhofer, would you like me to draft something?
